rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §12.1061, which governs commissioner recovery of charter school funds based on enrollment. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 12.1061. RECOVERY OF CERTAIN FUNDS. The commissioner may not garnish or otherwise recover funds paid to an open-enrollment charter school under Section 12.106
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns charter school fund recovery, unrelated to homestead exemptions.
